# Area 10.9 ‚Äî Decomposition Pipeline Entry Point

**Project:** `bill-decomposition-pipeline` | **Package:** `repcheck.decomposition.pipeline.app`, `repcheck.decomposition.pipeline.config`

Subscribes to `bill.text.ingested` events, orchestrates decomposition via `DecompositionOrchestrator`, emits `bill.decomposition.completed` events.

---

## Classes

### `BillDecompositionPipelineApp` ‚Äî IOApp Entry Point
**Package:** `repcheck.decomposition.pipeline.app`

Extends `IOApp`. Wires dependencies and runs pipeline.

```scala
object BillDecompositionPipelineApp extends IOApp
```

#### `run(args: List[String]): IO[ExitCode]`

Pure wiring only ‚Äî domain logic in companion `runPipeline` method.

1. Load `DecompositionPipelineConfig` via PureConfig
2. Build `Resource` bundle: AlloyDB transactor (Doobie/HikariCP), http4s Ember client (Ollama sidecar & Claude API), DJL section embedder (`SectionEmbedder.resource`), DJL search embedding model (`SemanticEmbeddingService.resource`)
3. Call `runPipeline(config, transactor, httpClient, sectionEmbedder, embeddingService, ...)`
4. Return `ExitCode`

#### `private[app] def runPipeline(config, transactor, httpClient, sectionEmbedder, embeddingService, ...): IO[ExitCode]`

Testable pipeline logic ‚Äî receives all dependencies as parameters.

1. **Wire providers:**
   - `StructuredOutputEnforcer[IO](config.llm.structuredOutputMaxRetries)`
   - `OllamaProvider[IO](httpClient, config.llm.ollama.get, enforcer)` ‚Äî section parsing (Ollama is `Some` in this pipeline)
   - `ClaudeProvider[IO](anthropicClient, config.llm.claude, enforcer)` ‚Äî Haiku simplification
   - `LlmRetryWrapper[IO](config.llm.retry, LlmErrorClassifier())` ‚Äî wraps both providers
2. **Wire components:**
   - `ConceptClusterer[IO](config.clustering)`
   - `DecompositionPersister[IO](transactor)`
   - `PipelineLogger[IO]` ‚Äî initialized with correlation context
   - `DecompositionOrchestrator[IO](ollamaProvider, sectionEmbedder, clusterer, embeddingService, claudeProvider, persister, config.decomposition, logger)`
   - `DecompositionEventPublisher[IO](pubsubPublisher, config.pubsub)`
3. **Subscribe to Pub/Sub:** Pull from `bill.text.ingested` subscription
4. **Stream processing via `parEvalMap(config.parallelism)`:** For each event:
   - Deserialize `PipelineEvent[BillTextIngestedPayload]`
   - Extract `billId` and `versionId` from payload
   - Call `orchestrator.decompose(billId, versionId, correlationId)`
   - Success ‚Üí `eventPublisher.publish(decompositionResult, correlationId)` ‚Üí `ProcessingResult.Succeeded`
   - Failure ‚Üí log error ‚Üí `ProcessingResult.Failed`
   - Ack Pub/Sub message
5. **Aggregate:** Collect `ProcessingResult`s ‚Üí `PipelineRunSummary`
6. Return `ExitCode.Success` if no fatal errors, else `ExitCode.Error`

> **`versionId` source:** Input event includes `versionId: UUID` (bill_text_versions PK). Component 4 creates this row when storing text and includes the ID in `BillTextIngestedEvent` payload.

### `DecompositionPipelineConfig`
**Package:** `repcheck.decomposition.pipeline.config`

PureConfig auto-derived top-level config.

```scala
case class DecompositionPipelineConfig(
  database: DatabaseConfig,
  pubsub: PubSubConfig,
  decomposition: DecompositionConfig,
  clustering: ClusteringConfig,
  embedding: EmbeddingConfig,
  llm: LlmAdapterConfig,
  parallelism: Int,
  retry: RetryConfig
)
```

> **Note:** `LlmAdapterConfig.ollama` is `Some(OllamaProviderConfig(...))` in this pipeline. Entry point asserts `config.llm.ollama.isDefined` at startup.

### `DecompositionEventPublisher[F[_]]` ‚Äî Event Emission
**Package:** `repcheck.decomposition.pipeline.app`

Publishes `bill.decomposition.completed` events to Pub/Sub.

```scala
class DecompositionEventPublisher[F[_]: Sync](
  publisher: PubSubPublisher[F],
  config: PubSubConfig
)
```

#### `publish(result: DecompositionResult, correlationId: UUID): F[Unit]`

1. Build `DecompositionCompletedPayload`: billId, versionId, conceptGroupCount, sectionCount from result
2. Wrap in `PipelineEvent[DecompositionCompletedPayload]` with correlationId
3. Serialize to JSON via Circe
4. Publish to `config.outputTopic`

### `DecompositionCompletedPayload` ‚Äî Event Payload
**Package:** `repcheck.decomposition.pipeline.app`

```scala
case class DecompositionCompletedPayload(
  billId: String,
  versionId: UUID,
  conceptGroupCount: Int,
  sectionCount: Int
)
```

> **Cross-component note:** Should be registered in `repcheck-pipeline-models` (Component 2) so analysis pipeline (10.10) can consume without circular dependency. Currently defined locally; analysis pipeline duplicates type.

---

## Key Design Decisions

1. **Ollama sidecar co-located** ‚Äî assumes localhost:11434, no discovery needed
2. **Two LlmProvider instances** ‚Äî OllamaProvider (section parsing) and ClaudeProvider (Haiku simplification), both passed separately to orchestrator
3. **DJL models as Resources** ‚Äî 384-dim for clustering (SectionEmbedder), search-quality for persistence (SemanticEmbeddingService), both loaded at startup, released on shutdown
4. **Testability via companion extraction** ‚Äî orchestration logic in testable `runPipeline` method; `run` is pure wiring only
5. **New event type** ‚Äî `bill.decomposition.completed` must be registered in pipeline-models
6. **Enforcer maxRetries from config** ‚Äî `StructuredOutputEnforcer` receives `config.llm.structuredOutputMaxRetries`

---

## Acceptance Criteria

| Criterion | Test |
|-----------|------|
| Config loads all subsystem configs via PureConfig | Valid `application.conf` ‚Üí `DecompositionPipelineConfig` populated |
| Startup asserts `config.llm.ollama.isDefined` | Missing ollama config ‚Üí fail fast |
| AlloyDB transactor created as `Resource` | Transactor acquired and released on shutdown |
| http4s Ember client created as `Resource` | Client acquired and released on shutdown |
| DJL section embedder loaded as `Resource` | Model loaded at startup, released on shutdown |
| DJL search embedding service loaded as `Resource` | Model loaded at startup, released on shutdown |
| `OllamaProvider` wired with http4s client and Ollama config | Provider receives `httpClient` and `config.llm.ollama.get` |
| `ClaudeProvider` wired with Anthropic SDK and Claude config | Provider receives SDK client and `config.llm.claude` |
| `StructuredOutputEnforcer` receives `structuredOutputMaxRetries` from config | Config value ‚Üí enforcer constructor |
| `PipelineLogger` wired into orchestrator | Logger created and passed to orchestrator |
| Pipeline subscribes to `bill.text.ingested` | Pub/Sub subscription created for configured topic |
| Input event contains `billId` and `versionId` | Event deserialized ‚Üí both fields available |
| Each event triggers decomposition orchestrator | Event received ‚Üí `orchestrator.decompose()` called |
| Successful decomposition emits `bill.decomposition.completed` | Success ‚Üí event published |
| Failed decomposition produces `ProcessingResult.Failed` | Failure ‚Üí `Failed` result, no event |
| Pub/Sub message acked after processing | Success and failure ‚Üí message acknowledged |
| Bills processed in parallel per config | `parallelism: 4` ‚Üí `parEvalMap(4)` |
| `PipelineRunSummary` aggregated from results | Results aggregated and reported |
| Correlation ID propagated input to output | Input event ID ‚Üí output event ID |
| `DecompositionCompletedPayload` serializes correctly | Round-trip: object ‚Üí JSON ‚Üí object |
| Pipeline logic in testable companion method | `runPipeline` callable with mock dependencies |
| `run` method is pure wiring with no domain logic | `run` only creates Resources and calls `runPipeline` |
| Exit code 0 on all success, 1 on any failure | Success ‚Üí `ExitCode.Success`; failure ‚Üí `ExitCode.Error` |
| Skipped decompositions still emit event | `alreadyExisted = true` ‚Üí event published with existing counts |
